task_completion.description: Log into FreeMED as the system administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED login screen with 'admin' entered, or the main FreeMED dashboard indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Appointment Types configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED interface showing the 'Scheduling Configuration' or 'Appointment Types' management screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the new appointment type name
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for adding/editing an appointment type with 'Weight Management Consult' entered into the Name or Title field.
The number '45' entered into the Duration or Length field (representing 45 minutes) on the same form.
A success message indicating the appointment type was saved, or 'Weight Management Consult' with a duration of 45 appearing in the list of existing appointment types.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the appointment type
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeMED web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands or direct database inserts to bypass the FreeMED UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the FreeMED web application and not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected appointment type name is exactly 'Weight Management Consult'. The expected duration is exactly 45 (minutes).
